_doc: Constraint-generation system-prompt bank. Each prompt is a .txt in this folder. All 10 are task-equivalent (same task + same hard output rules: code-only, no fences, model. prefix, scalar Constraint(expr=...) vs indexed def _rule + Constraint(model.set, rule=...)); only voice/structure/length vary. Training: randomly assign one TRAIN prompt per example, re-randomize across epochs. validation/test prompts are HELD OUT (never trained on).
note: sp01 is the original canonical prompt (= former constraint_gen_system_prompt.txt).
